# Crystal: Workspace memory maintenance stays schema-scoped

## Statement
- Maintenance scripts should update typed metadata and stable sections only.
- Free-form patching is a last resort, not the default path.

## Why It Matters
- Stable structure keeps retrieval and maintenance behavior testable.
